creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: Storm was removed from the ports collection because it was using unsupported version 2 of python. Attached storm 2.0 port requires python 2 as well so it cannot be added. Radim, if there's still any interest, the submission needs to be updated to address this (probably by updating to the latest version). If it requires additional software (rocksdbjni?) to work, it should be ported first.
